knowledge_bases.title: FreeDocStore Platform Docs
knowledge_bases.description: Full documentation for the FreeDocStore platform: architecture, publishing contract, registry, API worker, MCP server, creator console, Chrome extension, and templates.

knowledge_bases.title: True Non-Profit
knowledge_bases.description: A first-principles body of knowledge about non-profits and a trueness assessment framework.

knowledge_bases.title: React SPA — Gold Standard
knowledge_bases.description: Gold-standard rubric for the react-spa archetype (React, client-rendered, static-hosted; no SSR). The standard VibeCode QA judges react-spa slices against. Edition v1.
